title: smfeval scoring report
description: Structured report emitted by `smfeval score --json` and `--json-out`. Sub-objects carry tool-defined fields and may gain keys within a schema_version; the top-level set is fixed.

schema_version.description: Report contract version. Bumped when the report structure changes.

sync.description: Timestamp-matching diagnostics (pairs matched, dropped, gaps, sync risk).

alignment.description: Fitted alignment mode, transform, and degrees of freedom removed.

ensemble.description: Ensemble diagnostics (ensemble_se3 input only), else null.

gaussian_validity.description: Tangent-Gaussian validity diagnostic (gaussian_se3 input), else null.

scores.description: Proper scoring rules with confidence intervals.

calibration.description: PIT, interval coverage, and standardized-residual calibration.

diagnoses.description: Structured failure-mode diagnoses with severity and actions.
